name: Rheumatoid Arthritis - DMARD/Biologic Medication Query
description: Tests ability to find rheumatoid arthritis patients via disease-modifying antirheumatic drug (DMARD) and biologic prescriptions. RA management uses a step-up approach: conventional synthetic DMARDs (csDMARDs — methotrexate, hydroxychloroquine, sulfasalazine) as first-line, then biologic DMARDs (TNF inhibitors — adalimumab, infliximab) for inadequate responders. Synthea distributes patients across these two tiers. An LLM querying only methotrexate will miss the substantial fraction of patients on biologics-only or other csDMARDs.
prompt: Find patients prescribed disease-modifying antirheumatic drugs (DMARDs) used to treat rheumatoid arthritis, including methotrexate, hydroxychloroquine, sulfasalazine, and biologic DMARDs such as adalimumab and infliximab.

prompts.naive: Find patients on rheumatoid arthritis medications.
prompts.broad: Find patients prescribed disease-modifying antirheumatic drugs used in rheumatoid arthritis treatment: conventional DMARDs such as methotrexate, hydroxychloroquine, or sulfasalazine; or biologic TNF inhibitors such as adalimumab or infliximab.
prompts.expert: I need MedicationRequest resources for any DMARD class used in RA. Use these RxNorm ingredient codes: 6851 (methotrexate, anchor csDMARD), 5521 (hydroxychloroquine), 9524 (sulfasalazine), 327361 (adalimumab, anti-TNF biologic), 191831 (infliximab, anti-TNF biologic). Combine in a single comma-separated code search.

metadata.algorithm_path_description: Patients with DMARD/biologic medication orders (Paths A and C). Captures both diagnosed RA patients and Path C tricky patients on DMARDs without an RA diagnosis (e.g., methotrexate for psoriasis, hydroxychloroquine for lupus, sulfasalazine for IBD).
